title: The World Of Herobrine | paused
description: Herobrine have no mercy. will you kill him first ??
body:
![Herobrine logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9cb5ea38c522b353c550022db9889ade5ede609.png)

Hello all! welcome to my mod (The world of herobrine!) This mod adds herobrine to your minecraft server. fight Herobrine and make sure he doesn't kill you. he is fast and sees you coming from a distance. Try to survive and good luck! ![Creepy head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/317315e1925bb89e7d53cabd5d451badf33713f4.png)

![info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64c20abd2c5be06fc04ddbc85acf817a91bf48c7.png)


1 = Herobrine spawns in most Minecraft default biomes. about day/night.

2 = Herobrine is strong, and is difficult to kill. and he can kill you easy. be prepared!

3 = If you kill herobrine you get a herobrine block, this block is dangerous to stand on. ( TIP )

4 = Herobrine can teleporter and can easily keep up with you no matter how fast you run!

5 = Don't stand on grass blocks, herobrine will pull them out from under you XD!

![HEROBRINE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abb098182f995c15c4f62ed20453907f06d1bb5d.jpeg)
